description: Create a pipeline transect across varied terrain using the SRTM Digital Elevation Model (band_1) located at /home/ga/snap_data/srtm_dem.tif. Export the resulting elevation profile data to /home/ga/snap_exports/pipeline_profile.txt and save the product with the transect geometry to /home/ga/snap_exports/dem_transect.dim in BEAM-DIMAP format.
